text.title: field-descriptions-as-prompts Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for field-descriptions-as-prompts as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening

failure-mode.description: Description duplicates field name (age: int = Field(description="age"))
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Drop or expand to format/edge-case info

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Reasoning belongs in its own field; this field is for a value

failure-mode.description: Generic "the X for this object" pattern
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Concretize — what kind of X, in what units

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tighten to 1-3 sentences; the model parses bullet-style fine

failure-mode.description: Contradictory hints (name says cents, description says dollars)
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
